instruction:
Consider the random process $\left\{X(t) = A \cos(\beta t + \Theta)\right., -\infty < t < +\infty\}$ where $\beta$ is a constant, the random variable $A \sim U(0, 1)$, $\Theta \sim U(0, 2\pi)$ and they are independent of each other. Find the mean function $m(t)$, the correlation function $R(s, t)$, and the variance function $D(t)$ of the random process $\left\{X(t), -\infty \leq t \leq +\infty\right\}$ is ().

Options:
A. $$
m ( t ) \!=\cos(\Theta)
$$
$$
\begin{array} {c} {{{R ( s, t )=\frac{1} {9} \operatorname{c o s} ( \beta ( s-t ) )}}} \\ \end{array}
$$
$$
D ( t ) \!=\! \frac{1} {9}
$$
B. $$
m ( t ) \!=A
$$
$$
\begin{array} {c} {{{R ( s, t )=\frac{1} {8} \operatorname{c o s} ( \beta ( s+t ) )}}} \\ \end{array}
$$
$$
D ( t ) \!=\! \frac{1} {4}
$$
C. $$
m ( t ) \!=0
$$
$$
\begin{array} {c} {{{R ( s, t )=\frac{1} {6} \operatorname{c o s} ( \beta( s-t ) )}}} \\ \end{array}
$$
$$
D ( t ) \!=\! \frac{1} {6}
$$
D. $$
m ( t ) \!=\frac{1} {3}
$$
$$
\begin{array} {c} {{{R ( s, t )=\frac{1} {3} \operatorname{c o s} ( \beta ( s-t+1 ) )}}} \\ \end{array}
$$
$$
D ( t ) \!=\! 1
$$
E. $$
m ( t ) \!=\sin(\Theta)
$$
$$
\begin{array} {c} {{{R ( s, t )=\frac{2} {6} \operatorname{c o s} ( \beta ( 2s-t ) )}}} \\ \end{array}
$$
$$
D ( t ) \!=\! \frac{1} {10}
$$
F. $$
m ( t ) \!=\! \frac{1} {6}
$$
$$
\begin{array} {c} {{{R ( s, t )=\frac{1} {8} \operatorname{c o s} ( \beta ( s+t ) )}}} \\ \end{array}
$$
$$
D ( t ) \!=\! \frac{1} {8}
$$
G. $$
m ( t ) \!=\cos(\beta t)
$$
$$
\begin{array} {c} {{{R ( s, t )=\frac{1} {6} \sin( \beta ( s-t ) )}}} \\ \end{array}
$$
$$
D ( t ) \!=\! \frac{1} {3}
$$
H. $$
m ( t ) \!=\frac{1} {2}
$$
$$
\begin{array} {c} {{{R ( s, t )=A \operatorname{c o s} ( \beta ( s-t ) )}}} \\ \end{array}
$$
$$
D ( t ) \!=\! \frac{1} {2}
$$
I. $$
m ( t ) \!=\frac{1} {4}
$$
$$
\begin{array} {c} {{{R ( s, t )=\beta \operatorname{c o s} ( \beta ( s-t ) )}}} \\ \end{array}
$$
$$
D ( t ) \!=\! \frac{1} {5}
$$
J. $$
m ( t ) \!=\sin(\beta t)
$$
$$
\begin{array} {c} {{{R ( s, t )=\frac{2} {6} \operatorname{c o s} ( \beta ( s-t ) )}}} \\ \end{array}
$$
$$
D ( t ) \!=\! \frac{1} {7}
$$
